proposed_beads.title: End-to-end queue-dry temp-workspace gate
proposed_beads.description:
Run the dry-run pipeline against a synthetic temp workspace to keep mutation paths inert.

Candidate novel-temp-workspace ranked #1 with score 3.2320.

- output preserves duplicate and source evidence
